message:
feat(mission): include strategy metadata in fleet launch progress mail

Fleet launch progress updates now include a strategy field (e.g.,
"phased") in the mail envelope metadata, making it easier for
receiving agents to understand the launch coordination pattern in use.

- New unit test: emit_fleet_launch_progress_update_includes_strategy_metadata
- Integration test updated to verify strategy metadata on both start
  and progress envelopes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
